---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `artemis`
2. Enter: `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment

- Artemis version: (run `artemis --version`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / etc.)
- Shell: (zsh / bash / PowerShell)
- AI provider: (Anthropic / OpenAI / DeepSeek / etc.)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or logs.
